In this September, Wanyu will be a postdoctoral research fellow in the Department of Electrical and Computer Engineering at the University of Toronto, working with Professor Baochun Li.

Wanyu’s research generally focuses on developing machine learning algorithms for graph-structured data. She has worked on applying graph representation learning to various domains, such as social media analytics. She is also interested in model explanations for graph neural networks and machine learning in adversarial settings.

Wanyu is a member of IEEE and a member of IEEE Women in Engineering (WIE).

Wanyu enjoys reading, singing, and jogging in her leisure time. She loves to explore new places and enjoys natural beauties in the form of daily jogging.

Edward S.Roger Sr.

Department of Electrical and Computer Engineering


University of Toronto

10 King's College Road

Toronto, Ontario M5S 3G4, Canada
